closed_world.quote: A woman, a rather young looking one, is running quickly down the sidewalk in the town named St. Mysteri.

investigator.value: Sherry Lock, descendant of Sherlock Holmes, detective fresh out of college
investigator.quote: This girl is a descendant of Sherlock, but only got the sense of solving crimes from him.

social_world.value: Small town St. Mysteri known for business and commerce, with Sherry as outsider detective figure
social_world.quote: St. Mysteri is really known for it's well flourished business and all other sorts of things

media_and_audience.value: Town reputation affected by detective's presence, comedy-mystery genre expectations established
media_and_audience.quote: This town is not well known due to this woman, whose name is Sherry Lock

investigator_wound.value: Sherry characterized as dense and slow, potentially undermining her detective abilities
investigator_wound.quote: Sherry is also kind of dense and slow at some things
